channel.title: AI Lab Daily
channel.description: Daily practical guides on Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor and the cutting-edge AI tools used by indie devs and freelancers.

item.title: OpenAI Codex: 2026 Gartner Leader in AI Coding Agents
item.description: OpenAI named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex cited for scale.

item.title: OpenAI Codex: How Virgin Atlantic Shipped Zero P1 Bugs
item.description: OpenAI Codex helped Virgin Atlantic ship a revamped mobile app on a fixed deadline with near-total test coverage and zero P1 defects.

item.title: OpenAI Brazil News Partnership Brings 2 Media Giants to ChatGPT
item.description: OpenAI's Brazil news partnership with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL adds attributed journalism to ChatGPT. What it means and how to test it.

item.title: Figure AI Robots Sort Packages 24/7 for 8 Days
item.description: Figure AI robots ran an 8-day nonstop package-sorting livestream. What the unstaged demo means for humanoid robotics and automation.

item.title: Animated Gaussian Splatting: 5 Ways Devs Can Use It
item.description: Animated Gaussian splatting is going mainstream. Here's what the 3D rendering format is, why it matters, and 5 ways to try it today.

item.title: ChatGPT Personality: 5 Fixes for a Reluctant Tone
item.description: A viral 'Sure I guess' r/ChatGPT post revived the ChatGPT personality debate. Here's why tone drifts and 5 ways to fix it.

item.title: ChatGPT for Healthcare: AdventHealth Cuts Admin 80%
item.description: AdventHealth deploys ChatGPT for Healthcare across clinical, IT, finance and HR teams, cutting admin time and freeing clinicians for patients.

item.title: How Virgin Atlantic Shipped Faster With OpenAI Codex
item.description: OpenAI Codex helped Virgin Atlantic ship a revamped app by its holiday deadline with near-full test coverage and zero P1 bugs.

item.title: OpenAI Leads Enterprise AI Coding Agents (Gartner 2026)
item.description: OpenAI named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents, with Codex cited for scale.

item.title: OpenAI Codex Named Gartner Leader in Coding Agents
item.description: OpenAI named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents. What Codex's ranking means for builders.

item.title: DeepSeek V4 Pro Pricing: Up to 34x Cheaper Than GPT-5.5
item.description: DeepSeek V4 Pro pricing undercuts GPT-5.5 and Claude by 11-34x. What the token-cost gap means for AI margins and your stack.

item.title: Claude Skills for Small Business: 31 Free Packs to Try
item.description: Anthropic's 31 Claude Skills for small businesses are open .md files on GitHub. What they include and how to adapt them today.

item.title: ChatGPT Direct Answers: 5 Fixes to Stop the Hedging
item.description: Tired of disclaimers and filler? Here are 5 ways to get ChatGPT direct answers without the preamble, caveats, and hedging.

item.title: Anti-ChatGPT Ads Hit London Underground: 5 Takeaways
item.description: Activists posted fake anti-ChatGPT ads on the London Underground over AI safety. What the stunt means for AI builders.

item.title: Figure AI Humanoid Robots Log 200 Hours Sorting Packages
item.description: Figure AI says its humanoid robots ran 200 hours sorting packages. What the milestone means for warehouse automation.

item.title: ChatGPT for Healthcare: 5 AdventHealth Lessons
item.description: AdventHealth deploys ChatGPT for Healthcare to cut admin work and return time to patient care. Five takeaways for builders.

item.title: OpenAI Codex Named 2026 Gartner Leader for Enterprise Coding Agents
item.description: OpenAI Codex earns Leader status in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents. What it means for devs.

item.title: llms.txt Explained: 5 Things to Know in 2026
item.description: Anna's Archive published a llms.txt-style note to AI crawlers. Here is how the standard works and how to add one to your own site today.

item.title: OpenAI Codex on Dell: 5 Takeaways for Enterprise AI Coding
item.description: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments. Five takeaways for builders.

item.title: OpenAI Content Provenance: 5 Things to Know in 2026
item.description: OpenAI rolls out content provenance with C2PA Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool. Here's what creators should do.

item.title: Andrej Karpathy Joins Anthropic: 5 Things to Know
item.description: Andrej Karpathy joins Anthropic from OpenAI. What the hire signals for Claude, AI research talent, and indie builders in 2026.

item.title: Databricks GPT-5.5: 5 Wins for Enterprise AI Agents
item.description: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows after a state-of-the-art OfficeQA Pro benchmark result.

item.title: OpenAI Malta Partnership: ChatGPT Plus for All Citizens
item.description: OpenAI Malta partnership brings ChatGPT Plus and AI training to all citizens. What it means for indie builders worldwide.

item.title: OpenAI Dell Codex Partnership: 5 Enterprise Takeaways
item.description: OpenAI and Dell bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments. 5 takeaways for enterprise AI coding teams.

item.title: Databricks GPT-5.5 Agents: 5 Enterprise Workflow Takeaways
item.description: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows after a new OfficeQA Pro benchmark high. 5 takeaways for builders.

item.title: Malta ChatGPT Plus Partnership: 5 Things Citizens Can Do
item.description: Malta ChatGPT Plus partnership gives every citizen Plus access plus AI training. Here's what it means and how to copy the playbook.

item.title: OpenAI Dell Codex Partnership: 5 Takeaways for Devs
item.description: OpenAI and Dell bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments. 5 practical takeaways for developers and indie builders.

item.title: AI LinkedIn Profile: 5 Red Flags Recruiters Catch in 2026
item.description: Viral r/ClaudeAI thread mocks AI-written LinkedIn profiles. 5 patterns hurting reach plus fixes to try today.

item.title: ChatGPT Refuses Homework Help: 5 Lessons From a Viral Reddit Post
item.description: A viral Reddit thread shows ChatGPT lecturing instead of answering. Here are 5 prompt fixes that get straight answers.

item.title: ChatGPT "And Honestly" Tic: 5 Fixes That Actually Stick
item.description: ChatGPT's "and honestly?" filler is spreading fast. Here's why memory edits fail and 5 prompt fixes that actually work in 2026.
